entries.name: minimatch
entries.reason: Known high severity ReDoS in dev-only toolchain paths (@lhci/cli + typescript-eslint). Temporary exception while waiting upstream patch adoption.

entries.name: lodash
entries.reason: High severity in mixed scope (@lhci/cli + @astrojs/check). Both are dev/build tooling, not shipped to production.

entries.name: defu
entries.reason: High severity in Astro runtime transitive dep. Astro generates static output; defu is used only at build time, not in the shipped browser bundle.

entries.name: fast-xml-parser
entries.reason: High severity, transitive dep. Not directly used in production code.

entries.name: flatted
entries.reason: High severity, transitive dep. Not directly used in production code.

entries.name: h3
entries.reason: High severity, transitive dep (Astro internals / Nitro). Dev/build only, not shipped to static output.

entries.name: picomatch
entries.reason: High severity, transitive dep (anymatch/micromatch/workbox-build). Build tooling only.

entries.name: astro
entries.reason: Astro 5 runtime high advisory. gu-log builds static output from repo-controlled MDX/content and does not expose user-controlled slot names. Upgrading to Astro 6.4.6+ requires a legacy content collections migration; temporary exception until that migration lands.

entries.name: astro
entries.reason: Astro 5 SSR host-header advisory. gu-log deploys static output on Vercel and does not use Astro SSR/prerendered error page runtime fetch. Upgrading to Astro 6.4.6+ requires a legacy content collections migration; temporary exception until that migration lands.
